description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a rounded shoulder and a narrow neck, topped by a domed screw cap. The body is smooth and appears to be made of metal, likely stainless steel, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The base is slightly indented with subtle ridges for stability. On one side of the bottle, there is a small, rectangular label or branding element near the bottom, featuring a distinct color contrast. The surface finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the metallic material. The bottle is designed for portability and is suitable for carrying beverages in urban environments.
description: A tall, metallic bottle with a domed screw cap and a glossy, smooth surface. It features a small label near the base and is designed for carrying liquids.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, metallic body and domed cap, with no visible label.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the cap and body visible, but no label present.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the small, rectangular label near the base, with the rest of the bottle smooth and metallic.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the front and side, with no label visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: A small, rectangular label with a reddish-brown color and some text or logo, located near the bottom of the bottle on one side.
